zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Watson於1554年出生在英國時，她的父親Thomas Watson54歲，母親Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks49歲。她於大約1572年與William Smith在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年11月在英國英格蘭肯特享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Watson于1554年出生在英国时，她的父亲Thomas Watson54岁，母亲Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks49岁。她于大约1572年与William Smith在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年11月在英国英格兰肯特享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Watson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: patronymic meaning ‘son of Wat’, a pet form of Walter that was particularly common in Scotland and northern England. See Watt .

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Watson was born in 1554, in England, her father, Thomas Watson, was 54 and her mother, Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks, was 49. She married William Smith about 1572, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in November 1615, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Watson est née en 1554, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Watson, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé William Smith environ 1572, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1615, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Watsonが1554年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Watsonは54歳，母Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeksは49歳であった。約1572年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンでWilliam Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年11月にイギリスイギリスケントで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Watson(이)가 1554년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Watson(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1572년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 William Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Smith aproximadamente 1572, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1615, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Watson родилась в 1554 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Watson было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of Bengeworth, Worcestershire Weeks, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Smith около 1572 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1615 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
